slot.revelation.name: Revelation
slot.revelation.empty: Revelations obtained during exploration will appear here.
slot.aberration.name: Aberration
slot.aberration.empty: Aberrations obtained during exploration will appear here.
slot.swarmcall.name: Swarm Call
slot.swarmcall.empty: Swarm calls obtained during exploration will appear here.
effect.ursus_roar.name: Roar of Ursus
effect.ursus_roar.desc: At the start of each combat, apply 2 Weak to all enemies.
effect.yan_erosion.name: Erosion of Yan
effect.yan_erosion.desc: Gain 1 Energy at the start of each turn.
effect.columbia_innovation.name: Innovation of Columbia
effect.columbia_innovation.desc: At the end of your next combat, gain an additional rare card reward.
effect.sami_fortitude.name: Fortitude of Sami
effect.sami_fortitude.desc: When you take unblocked damage, reduce the damage by 2.
effect.victoria_glory.name: Glory of Victoria
effect.victoria_glory.desc: When you take damage, 25% chance to cancel the damage.
effect.leithanien_elegance.name: Elegance of Leithanien
effect.leithanien_elegance.desc: At the start of each combat, gain 8 Plating.
effect.sargon_generosity.name: Generosity of Sargon
effect.hematopoietic_disorder.name: Hematopoietic Disorder
effect.hematopoietic_disorder.desc: When below 80% HP, lose 2 HP at the end of each combat.
effect.focus_disorder.name: Focus Disorder
effect.focus_disorder.desc: In the first turn of each combat, control is taken over by Vakuu.
effect.neurodegeneration.name: Neurodegeneration
effect.neurodegeneration.desc: In the first turn of each combat, gain Ringing.
effect.flesh_distortion.name: Flesh Distortion
effect.flesh_distortion.desc: Upon obtaining, lose 50% Max HP. Upon removal, restore the lost Max HP.
effect.echo_strife.name: Echo: Strife
effect.echo_strife.desc: In this act, all friendly and enemy units gain 1 Strength at the start of each turn.
effect.echo_modification.name: Echo: Modification
effect.echo_modification.desc: In this act, gain 25 Gold when entering a non-combat room. Lose all Gold gained from this effect when leaving the act.
effect.echo_wither.name: Echo: Wither
effect.echo_wither.desc: Gold drops from combat +100%. After entering a combat room, lose 2 HP.
effect.echo_supply.name: Echo: Supply
effect.echo_supply.desc: After combat, 30% chance to drop an additional card reward. At the start of each combat, apply 4 Plating to all enemies.
effect.echo_long_road.name: Echo: Long Road
effect.echo_long_road.desc: Gain 3 Max HP after each combat in this act, but damage taken +50%.
effect.echo_allme.name: Echo: Collective Self
effect.echo_allme.desc: At the start of each combat, every time you play 5 cards, damage 10 to all enemies.Every time you play 10 cards, gain 1 Energy.
